display.purpose: Page titles in the main configuration column.

label.purpose: Field labels, buttons, eyebrows, and metadata.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus-visible ring on inputs and buttons.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Optional hover lift on interactive preview sections.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Control color and border transitions (ease-out-quart family).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA such as Ask support agent.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.984 0.019 200.873); background: oklch(0.52 0.105 223.128); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.105 223.128 / 80%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary header actions such as Templates.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Template name, access token, and support question fields.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Ask about setup, billing, or troubleshooting" />
components.css: .ds-input { box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; height: 2rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Top bar with brand marker and outline action.
components.html: Agentis
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 3.5rem; padding: 0 1rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-header-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-header-marker { width: 0.625rem; height: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.52 0.105 223.128); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-header-title { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); }

components.name: Preview Panel
components.description: Right-column template preview with bordered inner blocks.
components.html:
Template preview

Ready

Customer support agent

Agent answers from selected documentation.
components.css: .ds-preview { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; width: 100%; max-width: 24rem; padding: 1rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0 / 40%); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-preview-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-preview-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-preview-status { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-preview-block { padding: 0.75rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-block-title { margin: 0 0 0.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-block-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-preview-block:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 8%); }

components.name: Knowledge Toggle Item
components.description: Vertical toggle group item for documentation sources.
components.css: .ds-toggle-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 0.75rem; width: 100%; min-height: auto; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; text-align: left; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono Variable', monospace; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-toggle-item[aria-pressed='true'] { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-toggle-item:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-toggle-item:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 50%); } .ds-icon { flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.125rem; } .ds-toggle-copy { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-toggle-title { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-toggle-desc { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); }

narrative.overview: Agentis reads like documentation you can operate: warm precision, legible structure, and state that tells the truth. The product register is builder-dense (Linear, Raycast) but approachable for ops and platform users who are not writing code.
keyCharacteristics: Mono-forward typography with hierarchy from scale and weight
Neutral-first surfaces with runtime cyan accent ≤10%
Square control geometry and dense text-xs controls
Flat bordered panels with subtle lift on interaction

rules.name: The Neutral-First Rule
rules.body: The primary accent appears on ≤10% of any screen.

rules.name: The Runtime Cyan Rule
rules.body: Cyan-teal (~223°) is an infra signal, not a brand flood.

rules.name: The Dense Control Rule
rules.body: Buttons, inputs, and toggle items use text-xs.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest are flat with 1px borders.

rules.name: The Border-Not-Stripe Rule
rules.body: Never use thick colored left/right borders as decorative accents.

dos: Do keep configuration and preview visible together when space allows.
Do show real template names, knowledge labels, and runtime metadata in preview.
Do use primary cyan only for primary CTAs and small markers.
Do write errors in plain language with separated maintainer detail.
donts: Don't use generic AI SaaS slop: purple gradients, glass cards, gradient text, hero metrics.
Don't use modal-first flows or nested identical card grids.
Don't use colored border-left/right accent stripes on alerts.
Don't round buttons or inputs to pills while the codebase uses rounded-none.
Don't restate headings or promise capabilities the preview cannot demonstrate.
